description: Make key pages mobile-friendly: fix inline grid styles in dashboard pages, CarerDashboard, CareNotes, TaskBoard, and Residents to be responsive on mobile
steps: In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/ManagerDashboard.tsx - the KPI grid already uses className='grid-4' which is responsive. Verify the 3-column content section also uses className='grid-3'. No changes needed if already using CSS grid classes.

In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/CarerDashboard.tsx - the main split layout at line ~998 uses inline gridTemplateColumns: showForm || showTypePicker ? '1fr 1fr' : '1fr'. Add a className='carer-main-grid' and add CSS in index.css: @media (max-width: 768px) { .carer-main-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } } so on mobile the form appears below the task board, not beside it

In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/CarerDashboard.tsx - the note type picker at line ~1134 uses gridTemplateColumns:'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr))'. This is already responsive via minmax. No change needed.

In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/NurseDashboard.tsx - the clinical priority cards grid uses inline gridTemplateColumns: 'repeat(4, 1fr)'. Add className='nurse-kpi-grid' and add a CSS rule: @media (max-width: 768px) { .nurse-kpi-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr) !important; } } @media (max-width: 480px) { .nurse-kpi-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }

In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/FinanceDashboard.tsx - the 4-col KPI grid and 2-col content grid use inline styles. Add className='finance-kpi-grid' to the 4-col and className='finance-content-grid' to the 2-col. Add CSS rules to make them responsive.

In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/CleaningDashboard.tsx - multiple inline grids (5-col KPIs, 2fr 1fr main, 1fr 1fr, 1fr 1fr 1fr). Add classNames: 'cleaning-kpi-grid', 'cleaning-main-grid', 'cleaning-secondary-grid', 'cleaning-tertiary-grid'. Add CSS to collapse them: phone = 1 col, tablet = 2 col.
In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/KitchenDashboard.tsx - the 4-col meal service grid and 2-col main grid use inline styles. Add classNames and CSS overrides.
In frontend/src/pages/dashboards/MaintenanceDashboard.tsx - the 5-col KPI grid and various 2-col grids use inline styles. Add classNames and CSS overrides.
In frontend/src/pages/TaskBoard.tsx - review the layout. If it uses inline grids for task cards, add responsive classNames. The task chips already use flex-wrap which works on mobile.

In frontend/src/pages/Residents.tsx - the search bar uses flex with flex: '1 1 240px' which already wraps on mobile. The resident cards use flex column layout which is already single-column. Verify the 'View' button and risk badge don't overflow on narrow screens by adding flex-wrap to the card content row.

In frontend/src/pages/CareNotes.tsx - verify note cards are full-width. They use className='card' which is already block-level. Verify form fields stack. The main filter bar and note creation form may need responsive overrides if they use inline flex with fixed widths.
acceptance_criteria: Running `cd /projects/sandbox/jubilant-waddle/frontend && npm run build` succeeds with no errors
All dashboard KPI grids collapse to 2 columns on tablet and 1 column on phone
CarerDashboard split layout becomes single column on mobile
Dashboard content grids (2-col, 3-col sections) collapse to single column on mobile
Resident cards dont overflow on narrow screens
